title: Registration for digital platform information (DPI)
content:
Platform operators (also known as online marketplace operators) who must collect and report information about sellers on their platforms can now register for a DPI account.
You only need to register if both of the following apply, you:
- are a platform operator who is a tax resident in New Zealand
- connect buyers with sellers of relevant services .
The registration can be found in myIR under:
- Registration, application and enrolment section
- Register for new tax accounts.
Using your DPI account, you will need to report the required information by 7 February each year. To help you do this, see our guide Digital platform information - IR1170.
Information reporting overview
If you have any questions about your obligations, you can email us at DPI@ird.govt.nz
